zh.of Nantwich,Cheshire,England: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Wilbrugham於1306年出生在英國爾拉德諾時，她的父親Lord William de Wilbraham60歲，母親Lady Christiana de Crosselegh34歲。她於1312年之前與Robert le Maisterson在英國英格蘭爾南特維其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1370年在英國爾南特維其享年64歲。

zh-hans.of Nantwich,Cheshire,England: 英国英格兰爾南特維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Wilbrugham于1306年出生在英国爾拉德諾时，她的父亲Lord William de Wilbraham60岁，母亲Lady Christiana de Crosselegh34岁。她于1312年之前与Robert le Maisterson在英国英格兰爾南特維其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1370年在英国爾南特維其享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Wilbrugham was born in 1306, in Radnor, Cheshire, England, her father, Lord William de Wilbraham, was 60 and her mother, Lady Christiana de Crosselegh, was 34. She married Robert le Maisterson before 1312, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1370, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Wilbrugham est née en 1306, à Radnor, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William de Wilbraham, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady Christiana de Crosselegh, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert le Maisterson avant 1312, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1370, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Wilbrugham 1306 in Radnor, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William de Wilbraham 60 und ihre Mutter Lady Christiana de Crosselegh 34. Sie hat vor 1312 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Robert le Maisterson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Nantwich, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wilbrugham è nata il nel 1306 nel Radnor, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Lord William de Wilbraham, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Lady Christiana de Crosselegh, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert le Maisterson prima del 1312, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1370, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Wilbrughamが1306年にイギリスチェシュアイアラドノーで生まれた時，父Lord William de Wilbrahamは60歳，母Lady Christiana de Crosseleghは34歳であった。1312年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチでRobert le Maistersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1370年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Wilbrugham(이)가 1306년 영국 체실르 라드너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William de Wilbraham(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Christiana de Crosselegh(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1312년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 Robert le Maisterson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Nantwich,Cheshire,England: Nantwich, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wilbrugham nasceu em 1306, em Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William de Wilbraham, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christiana de Crosselegh, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert le Maisterson antes 1312, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1370, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Wilbrugham родилась в 1306 г. в местности раднор, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord William de Wilbraham было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christiana de Crosselegh, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert le Maisterson перед 1312 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Wilbrugham nació en 1306, en Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William de Wilbraham, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Lady Christiana de Crosselegh, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Robert le Maisterson antes de 1312, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1370, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
